name: Tamale Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup cheddar cheese, shredded about 2 ounces
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix ground beef, onion, and green pepper in a 2-quart casserole dish.
2. Microwave at HIGH (100%) for 4 minutes, stirring to break up the beef after half the cooking time.
3. Stir in tomato sauce, garlic, chili powder, taco seasoning mix, sugar, salt, and pepper. Microwave at HIGH (100%) for an additional 5 minutes.
4. Reduce microwave power to MEDIUMHIGH (70%). Microwave for another 5 minutes.
5. In a medium bowl, combine cornmeal, flour, baking powder, sugar, and salt. Stir in milk, egg, and shortening until the mixture is almost smooth.
6. Pour the cornbread batter over the beef mixture.
7. Bake at HIGH MIX (375 degrees) for 22 minutes or until the cornbread is golden brown. Sprinkle with topping ingredients.
8. Allow to cool for 5 minutes before serving.
